dialogues: Now look at this equation. What do you think?
You checked both sides. Smart thinking. Hold that thought.
You noticed it's the same equation, just flipped. Hold that thought.
Interesting. Something looks different about it. Hold that thought.
That's honest. It does look different. Hold that thought.
You can build equations. But today, equations have some surprises. You'll see them in new ways and figure out missing numbers.
